name: Kate McKinnon
blurb: An Emmy-winning impressionist and one of SNL's longest-serving women.
bio: Kate McKinnon is an American comedian and actress who joined Saturday Night Live in 2012 and won two Primetime Emmy Awards for her work, known for impressions of Hillary Clinton, Ruth Bader Ginsburg, and many others. She remained a leading cast member through 2022.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
